prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 15460→10733→11556→18725→8379，波动剧烈；2025 年基准约 8379 名，较 2024 年大幅前移约 10346 名，主要受新高考模式首年影响；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 141→137→133→135→148 人，2025 年扩招至 148 人；2026 年计划 149 人，较 2025 年仅增加 1 人，基本持平，对竞争格局影响微弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2021 年第 61 名→2025 年第 59 名→2026 年第 67 名，近年排名略有下滑但仍居全国百强；2023 年声誉评价中性/混合，涉及学校管理类舆情；2026 年高考周期内未出现明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第 68 位（评价一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热关注信号；安全科学与工程 A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术 A-、土木工程 A-，与该校矿业、安全、测绘类招生专业高度对应，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年内蒙古普通高考考生总数约 154000 人，较 2025 年 116360 人增长约 32.4%；按 2025 年比例估算物理类约 110800 人，较 2025 年 83716 人增长约 32.3%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，属东部非一线城市，对内蒙古考生地域吸引力中等；该校在内蒙古招生规模较大（物理类 149 人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移后的回调压力、2026 年招生计划基本持平、本省物理类考生大幅增加约 32.3% 等因素，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年有所加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约 8443 名，区间 7943–8943 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电子信息工程/自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人工智能/机器人工程
- 机械类（含智能制造工程、机械工程）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、统计学）
- 安全科学与工程类
- 能源动力类（含储能科学与工程、能源与动力工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 矿业类（含智能采矿工程、新能源科学与工程、采矿工程）
- 测绘类（含测绘工程、地理信息科学）
- 土木类/智能建造
- 地质类（含地质工程、资源勘查工程）
- 材料科学与工程/化工与制药类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 7943–8943 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（安全科学与工程类 A+、机械类、数学类等），一档专业（电气、计算机、电子信息）作为冲刺，三档专业（矿业类、测绘类、土木类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<7943 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>8943 名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 15460→10733→11556→18725→8379, with significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 8379, a substantial advance of about 10346 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the first year of the new college entrance examination model; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 141→137→133→135→148 respectively, with an expansion to 148 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 149, an increase of only 1 compared to 2025, essentially flat, with minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was 61st in 2021→59th in 2025→67th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, involving school management-related public opinion; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no significant negative events occurred; Douyin popularity ranking is 68th (average evaluation), with moderate short video exposure and no high-attention signals; Safety Science and Engineering is A+ (top nationally), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, Civil Engineering is A-, which highly correspond to the university's mining, safety, and surveying enrollment majors, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, an increase of about 32.4% compared to 116,360 in 2025; estimated physics category candidates based on 2025 proportion are about 110,800, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 83,716 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, a non-first-tier city in the east, with moderate regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia (149 in physics category), making it a key source province outside the region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure after the significant advance in 2025 rankings, the essentially flat enrollment plan for 2026, and the substantial increase of about 32.3% in provincial physics category candidates, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025, with a slight backward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8443, with a range of 7943–8943.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Artificial Intelligence/Robotics Engineering
- Mechanical Category (including Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Engineering)
- Mathematics Category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Safety Science and Engineering Category
- Energy and Power Category (including Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mining Category (including Intelligent Mining Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Mining Engineering)
- Surveying and Mapping Category (including Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Geographic Information Science)
- Civil Engineering Category/Intelligent Construction
- Geology Category (including Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Materials Science and Engineering/Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Category.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7943–8943, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering Category A+, Mechanical Category, Mathematics Category, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Mining Category, Surveying and Mapping Category, Civil Engineering Category) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7943), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8943), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移后的回调压力、2026 年扩招 25%（3 人）及本省历史类考生大幅增加约 32.3% 等因素，预计 2026 年位次较 2025 年明显后移；预测最低位次约 1874 名，区间 1537–2211 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1775→2477→2367→3908→1612, with significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 1612, a substantial advance of about 2296 places compared to 2024, with a notable increase in ranking in the first year of the new college entrance examination model; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 8→8→9→10→12 students respectively, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 15 students, an increase of 3 students (25% expansion) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate that will push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 67th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, among the top 100 nationally, with a stable level; recent reputation evaluation is mixed/neutral, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average, with no high-attention signals; the liberal arts majors at CUMT (Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) have no directly corresponding A-class disciplines, but relying on the 211 platform, overall recognition is acceptable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, an increase of about 32.4% compared to 2025; estimated by the 2025 ratio, the history category is about 43,200, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 32,644 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, with moderate regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; the liberal arts enrollment scale is small (15 students in 2026), belonging to a medium-scale out-of-province source.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure after the significant ranking advance in 2025, the 25% expansion (3 students) in 2026, and the substantial increase of about 32.3% in the number of history category candidates in the province, it is expected that the ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1874, with a range of 1537–2211.

- Business Administration (including Accounting, Human Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Network and New Media.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 1537–2211, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Public Administration, Network and New Media) as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (English, Public Administration) as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1537), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2211), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
